name: LINCOLN ELECTRIC HOLDINGS INC
summary: General As used in this Annual Report on Form10-K, the term "Company," except as otherwise indicated by the context, means Lincoln Electric Holdings,Inc. and its wholly-owned and majority-owned subsidiaries for which it has a controlling interest. Founded in 1895 and incorporated in the state of Ohio in 1906 as The Lincoln Electric Company, the Company reorganized into a holding company structure as Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. in 1998.
